name: Todd Warnken

contactInfo.office: 106 Courthouse, 100 W. Columbia St., San Augustine, TX 75972

bio: Todd Warnken serves as the County Attorney for San Augustine County, handling criminal prosecutions and providing legal guidance to the county. He is dedicated to serving the residents of one of the oldest counties in Texas.
campaignPromises: Effectively prosecute criminal cases in San Augustine County
Protect the legal interests of the county
Advocate for crime victims and their families
Operate a responsible and transparent county attorney's office
Coordinate with law enforcement on public safety initiatives
